occurrence_sentence: Proactively seek to attract, retain and invest in skilled quantum individuals who want to come to the UK, including delivering a quantum stream of the Global Talent Network.

interaction_phrase: in the UK
occurrence_sentence: The UK has an exceptional history in modern quantum physics, from the seminal theoretical work of Artur Ekert in the early 1990s that showed that encrypted keys can be secured by quantum systems, to the cutting-edge technologies now being developed in our research organisations and businesses.

interaction_phrase: UK's visionary National Quantum Technologies Programme
occurrence_sentence: The UK's visionary National Quantum Technologies Programme (NQTP), first formed in 2014, has brought together government, academia and industry to bring the promising science of quantum into wider society.

interaction_phrase: delivered by Innovate UK
occurrence_sentence: • £184 million (including an additional £10 million granted in 2023) to support universities and companies to work together to research and develop quantum technologies through the Commercialising Quantum Technologies Challenge, delivered by Innovate UK, that is funding industry-led projects to develop new products and technologies based on advances in quantum science;

interaction_phrase: £93 million in the National Quantum Computing Centre (NQCC)
occurrence_sentence: • £93 million in the National Quantum Computing Centre (NQCC), a new research institution funded through UKRI, that is driving activities to build a scalable quantum computer in the UK;

interaction_phrase: The Quantum Metrology Institute at the National Physical Laboratory (NPL)
occurrence_sentence: • The Quantum Metrology Institute at the National Physical Laboratory (NPL) that provides a national capability in testing, evaluating and accelerating the commercialisation of quantum technologies, as well as leading for the NQTP in the development of international standards;

occurrence_sentence: Businesses supported by the UK Commercialising Quantum Challenge have raised over £425m in private sector financing since the programme began.

occurrence_sentence: To this end we will engage with UK professional bodies including the Institution of Engineering & Technology (IET) and the Institute of Physics (IoP) to develop awareness, skills and recognition of continuing professional development and careers in support of the quantum sector.

interaction_phrase: work hand in hand with the National Quantum Technologies Programme
occurrence_sentence: It will work hand in hand with the National Quantum Technologies Programme, which will continue to provide access to funding, equipment, infrastructure, and networks to encourage world leading quantum talent to base research and commercial activities in the UK.

interaction_phrase: operating in the United States
occurrence_sentence: Deliver a quantum priority stream in the UK Global Talent Network. The network, operating in the United States and India, will proactively attract and support the best internationally mobile science and technology talent to come to the UK.

interaction_phrase: Commission the Royal Academy of Engineering
occurrence_sentence: Commission the Royal Academy of Engineering to undertake an independent infrastructure review by the end of 2023 to map the UK's quantum infrastructure and the sector's infrastructure requirements for the next decade against those of other key UK sectors (such as semiconductors, photonics or space), including for fabrication facilities.

interaction_phrase: Innovate UK: EDGE programmes
occurrence_sentence: There are a range of existing support mechanisms available to UK businesses to help them overcome the challenges of starting and scaling their business such as the Innovate UK: EDGE programmes, ICURe, and QUEST.

interaction_phrase: to make finance markets for smaller businesses work more effectively, allowing those
occurrence_sentence: The British Business Bank is an important delivery partner in our efforts to make finance markets for smaller businesses work more effectively, allowing those businesses to prosper, grow and build UK economic activity.

occurrence_sentence: The British Business Bank is an important delivery partner in our efforts to make finance markets for smaller businesses work more effectively, allowing those businesses to prosper, grow and build UK economic activity.

interaction_phrase: UK-wide programme
occurrence_sentence: The British Business Bank has also launched Future Fund: Breakthrough, a £375 million UK-wide programme that will co-invest alongside private investors directly in later funding rounds at high-growth, innovative firms.

interaction_phrase: Analysis by Innovate UK
occurrence_sentence: Based on a survey of 54 relevant UK companies, 85% are importing elements of their supply chain to develop quantum technologies.33 UK companies are a key part of this global supply chain. We have industrial strengths and leading companies across the supply chain, in areas such as photonics, electronics and cryogenics, which are essential to quantum technologies. We have world leading clusters, such as the compound semiconductor cluster in South Wales, and a long-established photonics cluster in Scotland. To promote our companies in domestic and global supply chains and to boost investment, we will: Work with key organisations such as UKQuantum and techUK and the Department for Business and Trade to develop promotional material targeted at critical user sectors for dissemination nationally and internationally, as well as to deliver a targeted global 33 Analysis by Innovate UK, see technical annex for more details

interaction_phrase: Play an active role in the World Economic Forum
occurrence_sentence: Play an active role in the World Trade Organisation, the World Economic Forum, the G7, the G20, OECD, NATO, the Council of Europe, the Commonwealth and the UN, including utilising the UK seat on the International Telecommunications Union (ITU) to ensure that quantum regulation supports UK business and innovation, that the UK's wider prosperity, security and defence interests are represented and that we continue to uphold the UK's values including those on human rights.

interaction_phrase: Play an active role in the World Trade Organisation

interaction_phrase: Standards development organisations with activity on quantum technology include
occurrence_sentence: There are a number of early quantum standardisation activities taking place globally with significant focus on quantum safe cryptography and QKD, with UK leadership in these areas. Standards development organisations with activity on quantum technology include: International Organization for Standardization (ISO); International Electrotechnical Commission (IEC); International Telecommunication Union (ITU); Internet Engineering Task Force (IETF); the European Telecommunications Standards Institute (ETSI); and the Institute of Electrical and Electronics Engineers (IEEE).
